capabilities_used.evidence: 他反复盯着 OI 与价格背离。[2024-06-30]“$BTC's OI went up $1b while price didn't go anywhere at all”; [2024-11-29]“Open interest reset, support held up”; 图2/6/7 都把 Aggregated Open Interest 放在主图下方，用它判断是否积累了会触发突破或挤仓的仓位。

他经常把 funding 当成健康度/拥挤度过滤器。[2025-04-29]“Neutral basis, keeps grinding against resistance... kinda looks like $BTC wants to pop higher”; [2026-02-26]“no significant open interest increase or rise in funding. This is actually starting to look pretty nice.” 图2/6/7 都同时展示 funding 与价格。

他直接用 perps basis / premium 判断多空拥挤。[2024-04-30]“perps basis is closer to neutral now”; [2024-01-31]“We still got a nice spot premium, but Coinbase is trading at a discount again”; 图8右上角明确显示“Perps basis %”。
他明显在看清算分布与扫损路径。图4是 coinalyze 的全市场 liquidations；[2025-09-25]“quite likely that it does one more stop run, tapping 110k before some actual relief” 明确是先扫流动性再反转的叙事。
图7 直接圈出 BTC 冲上区间上沿后的局部扫高；[2026-03-31]“Significant amount of liquidity taken at that local low... now probably wants to offload”; [2025-09-25]“one more stop run” 也是典型 sweep 语言。

他很常先定义‘chop / range / no man's land’再决定不追单。[2025-03-29]“It's clear that we're just chopping, waiting for a catalyst”; [2025-07-31]“For me this is in no man's land”; [2024-11-30]“Volume is dead, just come back Monday.”
他常把交易框架建立在箱体边界与局部高低点上。图7 画出明显水平区间并在上沿附近评估反应；[2025-07-31]“I would only take a trade if takes either the local low/high out and then you can scalp it into the other direction.”
图7 是突破区间上沿后在高位犹豫的典型真假突破观察；[2025-09-29]“$ETH starting to look like this was just a bear trap”; [2025-09-25] 先冲 110k 再 relief 也暗含假突破/诱多后的反手。

他频繁把 ETF 流量作为 BTC/ETH 需求代理。[2024-02-29]“$IBIT alone did $670m of inflows”; [2024-09-28]“inflows are kinda nuts again”; [2024-05-31]“we got some very high ETF flows today”; [2026-02-26]“It was actually the ETFs who did the buying today.”
他会把宏观风险偏好作为上层过滤器。[2026-04-10]“Insane recovery... hard to imagine that this isn't just on its way to make a new ATH. $SPX”; 多条推文围绕 Trump/Fed/market open 对加密风险偏好的传导。
[2024-07-31]“today is a big day. FED fund rate decision + FOMC”; [2024-09-30]“FED's Bostic...” 说明他会围绕宏观事件窗口调低确定性，把事件当波动触发器。

[2025-05-28]“if the daily closes like this then personally I wouldn't think about longing anymore until a bunch of that OI gets scorched”; [2025-05-30]“about $2b in OI closed on that small move down” 说明他很在意高杠杆多头被清洗后的再上车窗口。
[2025-08-29]“Seems like a lot of shorts are coming in now”; [2024-11-29]“Open interest reset, support held up... we're gonna take out the local highs” 体现他会把拥挤空头视为上冲燃料。
[2025-09-29]“$BTC pumping on increasing BTC dominance is very healthy”; [2024-02-29]“$DOGE heating up has got to be good news for alts in general” 说明他也会用 BTC.D/风险偏好轮动理解山寨表现。
虽然他不是均线驱动型交易员，但图6 对 SOL 的中期结构突破后重回关键区间、图7 对上沿收复后的观察，体现了‘关键位收回’式趋势切换确认，只是不是用传统均线而是用水平结构。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Spot-Perp Orderflow Divergence
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Detect when spot exchange flow and perpetual futures positioning disagree, such as spot selling into rising perp premium or spot buying while perp leverage stays muted. Used to infer whether a move is real demand, passive distribution, or a squeeze setup.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 识别现货交易所流向与永续合约仓位/基差不一致的情形，例如现货在卖而永续溢价上升，或现货在买而杠杆并未同步扩张。用于判断上涨是否真实需求、是否存在被动派发，或是否处于挤仓前夜。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2024-04-30]“spot dumping... perps basis is closer to neutral now”; [2024-10-31]“The perps basis is rising because spot has been selling off today. Especially Coinbase has been quite bearish.” 图8同时看现货 CVD、perps basis 与价格。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Venue-Specific Passive Buyer/Seller Detection
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 分交易所被动买卖盘识别
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Track exchange-specific spot behavior such as Coinbase, Bitstamp, OKX, or Bitfinex to identify persistent passive sellers/buyers, TWAP execution, and venue-led directional pressure.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 跟踪 Coinbase、Bitstamp、OKX、Bitfinex 等单一交易所的现货行为，识别持续性的被动卖家/买家、TWAP 执行，以及由特定场馆主导的方向压力。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2024-01-30]“Someone on OKX has been offloading a bunch of spot with limit orders all day”; [2024-07-30]“Coinbase $BTC spot CVD skyrocketed today, but it seems like it was mostly limit selling”; [2024-08-31]“Bitfinex started twapping $BTC.”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: OI Reset After Flush
new_capabilities_proposed.description: After a sharp but not structurally damaging move, open interest collapses while price holds key support/resistance. The reset is interpreted as leverage cleansing that improves trend continuation odds.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 在一次剧烈但未破坏结构的价格波动后，未平仓合约显著回落，而价格仍守住关键支撑/阻力。该重置被视为杠杆洗净，提升原趋势延续概率。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2024-11-29]“Open interest reset, support held up. Looks to me like we're gonna take out the local highs”; [2025-05-30]“about $2b in OI closed on that small move down. $BTC”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: No Man's Land Trade Filter
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Avoid trading when price is trapped between meaningful local extremes without a catalyst, clean level interaction, or leverage asymmetry. Wait for either boundary sweep or catalyst expansion.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 当价格位于关键局部高低点之间、缺乏催化剂、缺乏明确水平位反应且杠杆不对称不明显时，选择不交易。等待边界被扫或催化剂带来扩张后再出手。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2025-07-31]“For me this is in no man's land”; [2025-03-29]“we're just chopping, waiting for a catalyst”; [2024-11-30]“Volume is dead, just come back Monday.”

personal_quirks.quote: Open interest reset, support held up. Looks to me like we're gonna take out the local highs and potentially take a stab at piercing 100k.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 先看杠杆是否被洗掉，再看结构位是否仍然成立；若成立，则倾向顺原方向继续。

personal_quirks.quote: The market is stalling here. Even Coinbase's last bullish bidding session couldn't get us out of the range. Makes a lot of sense to be defensive here.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 如果最强的买盘代理都推不出区间，就降低风险，不预设突破一定发生。

personal_quirks.quote: If the daily closes like this then personally I wouldn't think about longing anymore until a bunch of that OI gets scorched or we reach a nice technical level like 95k or sum.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 拥挤仓位未清洗前不追多，宁可等 OI 出清或等更好的结构位。

personal_quirks.quote: These smol moves from the past two weeks are basically irrelevant because the books are so dead. It's clear that we're just chopping, waiting for a catalyst to push us in a direction.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 订单簿太薄、缺催化时，微小波动没有信息含量，不值得赋予趋势意义。

personal_quirks.quote: For me this is in no man's land. I would only take a trade if takes either the local low/high out and then you can scalp it into the other direction.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 区间中部不交易，只在边界扫损后做反手或极短线反应。

unique_traits: 他和常规 TA 交易员的差别在于，核心不是形态学本身，而是把 OI、funding、basis、CVD、ETF flows 这些衍生品与订单流变量叠加到结构位上做判断。图表里几乎总有‘价格 + OI + funding/basis + volume/CVD’四件套，说明他更像是以仓位结构和流动性清洗为中心的交易员。整体上偏反身性与拥挤度分析，喜欢找‘杠杆被洗净后继续’或‘先扫流动性再走真实方向’的机会。

high_conviction_phrases: one of the most free trades ever
hard to imagine that this isn't
we're gonna take out the local highs
low_conviction_phrases: I can't tell if this is bullish or bearish
for me this is in no man's land
